## Description

What does this PR change and why? Link to any related issues.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling / chore

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `pylint` shows no new warnings (or exceptions explained below)
- [ ] Manual testing described below

Describe any manual testing you did:

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality (when practical)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed (`docs/`, docstrings)
- [ ] I have noted any third-party code I included and its license

## Additional Notes

Anything reviewers should know — design decisions, caveats, follow-up work.
